title: Bufnorm crashes on bi-directional drivers in design

features.name: inout port on blackbox module driving wire
features.description: Code should include a blackbox module with an inout port that drives a wire, creating a bidirectional driver

features.name: multiple blackbox inout ports driving same wire
features.description: Code should include a wire that is driven by inout ports from multiple blackbox module instances, creating multiple bidirectional drivers on the same signal
